name: Manitou BF SA
summary: Manitou BF SA designs, develops, manufactures, and provides equipment and services for the construction, agriculture, and industry sectors worldwide. It operates through three divisions: Material Handling and Access (MHA); Compact Equipment Products (CEP); and Services & Solutions (S&S). The MHA division designs, assembles, and distributes fixed, rotating, and heavy tonnage telehandlers; rough terrain, semi-industrial, industrial, and truck mounted forklift trucks; articulated loaders; aerial work platforms; and warehousing equipment and attachments. This division offers its products under the Manitou brand name for use in the environmental, mining, and industrial sectors; and for institutional customers, such as the armed forces, as well as organizations comprising the UN, civil protection bodies, etc. The CEP division develops and produces compact handling equipment, including skid-steer loaders, track and articulated loaders, backhoe loaders, and telehandlers, as well as compact excavators under the Gehl and Mustang brands. The S&S division provides financing, warranty and warranty extension contracts, maintenance and full service contracts, rent to rent contracts, fleet management contracts, technical training, used equipment sales, etc., as well as end-user services consisting of geo-location, user training, advice, etc. This division also distributes spare parts and attachments. The company also offers its products through a network of dealers. Manitou BF SA was incorporated in 1954 and is headquartered in Ancenis, France.
